creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Dear Submitter, I would like to ask you to seek out advise on the 
questions@ mailinglist first. The behaviour you are seeing might be 
because of improper installation or anything, but severely lacks 
information that would assist in tracking a PR. If you have generated 
more information that might be usable, please get back to me so that we 
can denote that properly.
